resources.title: MDN: CSS Logical Properties and Values
resources.description: Complete MDN reference for all CSS logical properties with syntax and browser support data.

resources.title: MDN: Logical Properties for Sizing
resources.description: Deep dive into logical sizing properties: inline-size, block-size, and their min/max variants.

resources.title: CSS-Tricks: CSS Logical Properties
resources.description: Comprehensive guide to CSS logical properties with practical examples and migration strategies.

resources.title: Smashing Magazine: Logical Properties for International Layouts
resources.description: In-depth exploration of using logical properties for international web layouts with real-world examples.

resources.title: RTL Styling 101
resources.description: A comprehensive resource for right-to-left styling techniques with CSS, including logical properties.

resources.title: W3C: CSS Logical Properties Specification
resources.description: Official W3C specification document for CSS Logical Properties and Values Level 1.

resources.title: CSS Writing Modes Specification
resources.description: W3C specification for CSS Writing Modes, which logical properties are built upon.

resources.title: Can I Use: CSS Logical Properties
resources.description: Browser support tables for CSS Logical Properties across all major browsers.

resources.title: PostCSS Logical Plugin
resources.description: PostCSS plugin that generates physical property fallbacks for logical properties automatically.

resources.title: Kevin Powell: CSS Logical Properties
resources.description: Practical walkthrough of CSS logical properties with visual demonstrations and real examples.

resources.title: Web Dev Simplified: CSS Logical Properties Explained
resources.description: Clear explanation of when and why to use CSS logical properties in your projects.

resources.title: Google Web Dev: Building RTL-Aware Layouts
resources.description: Google's guide to building RTL-aware web layouts using CSS logical properties.
